title: dortmanna tomentosa
intro: Dortmanna tomentosa, also known as toothache tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dortmanna tomentosa include relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
